caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Rise
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing 22 kt winds with 4.8 ft wave heights and a 50% rain probability, while Martinique has lighter conditions with 12 kt winds. I expect the Western Caribbean to be more impacted today, with Roatan being the top affected port due to the higher wind speeds and wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 25 kt winds with 4.8 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Marseille has 18 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the NNE, impacting maritime activities in the Eastern and Central Mediterranean, particularly in ports like Mykonos.
